results.rendered_html: adrogha (3. a + drogha) adj. truglos, wahrhaftig: tvaṃ dehi sahasriṇaṃ rayiṃ no 'drogheṇa vacasā satyamagne  ṚV. 3,14,6 . 32,9 . 6,12,3 . ye adroghamanuṣvadhaṃ śravo madanti yajñiyāḥ 5,22,1 . adrogham adv. zuverlässig: adroghamā vahośato yaviṣṭhya devā~ ajasra vītaye 8,49,4 .

adrogha a. Ved. [druh-ghañ vede ghatvaṃ na. ba.] True, not false, free from malice; ˚vāc speaking the truth; ˚avita guarding from malice.
— ghaṃ ind. Without malice or falsehood.
